Payments

How payouts are handled across the platform.

Refunds

Refunds to customers. A claim becomes a decision, a decision becomes a payout.

Claim rules

Registration is handled by ClaimRegistrationService.

CaseDeadlineOwner
Standard case5 working daysDecisionServiceImpl
Manual correction1 working dayoperator

Examples

if (claim.isRefund()) {
    claimService.register(claim);

    DecisionServiceImpl.decide(claim);
}
